mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mes_pro_work_order WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mes_dv_machinery WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mes_pro_andon_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.pro.MesProAndonStatusEnum@ACTIVE.status}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mes_dv_repair WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.dv.MesDvRepairStatusEnum@PREPARE.status}, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.dv.MesDvRepairStatusEnum@CONFIRMED.status}, ${@cn.iocoder.yudao.module.mes.enums.dv.MesDvRepairStatusEnum@APPROVING.status})
